title: Add user profile picture upload
description: Implement file upload for user profile pictures with size and format validation. Support jpg and png up to 5MB.

title: Improve sign-in session reliability
description: Completed a user-visible sign-in reliability improvement for the July release. Users should see fewer unexpected sign-outs after reauthentication, and duplicate sign-in submissions are now handled more gracefully. Summarize this as a concise public release note item.

title: Refactor notification service
description: Rewrite notification service to use message queues for better reliability. Design new retry logic and dead-letter queue.

title: Update documentation for API v2
description: Create OpenAPI spec for v2 endpoints and update developer portal. Include migration guide from v1.
